content.text:
Based on the detailed view of atom C:25 in the molecule, I can clearly identify its covalent neighbors:

1. N:24 (nitrogen, atomic index 24) - bonded to C:25
2. C:20 (carbon, atomic index 20) - bonded to C:25  
3. H:26 (hydrogen, atomic index 26) - bonded to C:25

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 9070 (from the filename "geomconf_9070.xyz").

So the neighbor atoms of atom C:25 are:
- Atomic index 24, element N
- Atomic index 20, element C  
- Atomic index 26, element H

Geomconf_index: 9070

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 25, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
